name: NTAO Technician Onboarding
description: Onboarding process for NTAO (Network Territory Assignment Optimization) technician

steps.title: Verify Technical Qualifications
steps.description: Confirm technical skills and certifications required for NTAO

substeps.title: Verify technical certifications
substeps.description: Confirm relevant certifications for network optimization

substeps.title: Validate relevant work experience
substeps.description: Review previous experience in network or territory management

steps.title: Configure NTAO System Access
steps.description: Set up access to specialized NTAO tools and systems

substeps.title: Grant access to analytics platform
substeps.description: Configure access to network analysis and optimization tools

substeps.title: Set up territory mapping system access
substeps.description: Provide access to geographic mapping and territory tools

substeps.title: Configure optimization software licenses
substeps.description: Assign licenses for route and territory optimization software

substeps.title: Set up reporting dashboard access
substeps.description: Configure access to performance metrics and reporting tools

steps.title: Complete NTAO Specialized Training
steps.description: Undergo training specific to NTAO responsibilities

substeps.title: Complete network analysis methodology training
substeps.description: Learn techniques for analyzing network efficiency and performance

substeps.title: Study optimization algorithms and techniques
substeps.description: Understand algorithms used for territory and route optimization

substeps.title: Complete data interpretation training
substeps.description: Learn to analyze and interpret performance metrics and KPIs

substeps.title: Training on stakeholder communication
substeps.description: Learn to present findings and recommendations effectively

steps.title: Complete Integration and Setup
steps.description: Finalize integration with NTAO team and processes

substeps.title: Integrate with NTAO team
substeps.description: Meet team members and understand team dynamics

substeps.title: Assign initial projects
substeps.description: Provide first assignments to begin productive work
